name: Warrior Architects
short_description: The game's story follows the grand adventures of warriors who encounter various villages and tribes. Collaborating with these tribes, they transform small villages into large fortresses, building defenses to repel external attacks. Their efforts earn the trust of the people.
detailed_description:
The story of this game revolves around the grand adventure of warriors. Along their journey, they encounter various villages and tribes, and collaborate with them to develop small villages into large fortresses. Throughout their adventure, they face different challenges and attacks from bandits, beasts, and monsters. To protect the tribes from these assaults, the warriors work with the villagers to build walls, towers, and other defensive structures, fending off external threats. Through these efforts, the warriors earn the trust of different tribes.

This game is about different tribes and their battles against enemy tribes. During the development of the village, players will face challenges including invasions from all directions and bandit nests.

• Players can control units to gather resources and build various structures to strengthen their village's capabilities and prevent external enemy invasions.

• To enhance the units' abilities, players can research relevant technologies and acquire different types of units and buildings. They can equip units with various weapons and armor to enhance their capabilities and use items to support units and repair buildings.

• Each campaign features a different story, telling the adventures of warriors and their collaborative efforts with villagers to build the village. Some campaigns have unique missions and gameplay.

To help the villagers continue developing, cooperation is the key to success.
